response.justification: Bogdan is a highly skilled and experienced senior individual contributor with impressive technical depth in backend systems, high-scale data processing, and even some recent exposure to agentic AI workflows. However, this is an executive leadership role requiring a proven track record of scaling engineering organizations, developing senior leaders, and setting technical vision at a company level. His resume shows a career path of a Staff/Senior IC with no demonstrated experience in management, team scaling, or executive communication, which is a fundamental mismatch with the core responsibilities of the CTO position.
strengths: Deep, hands-on experience with high-throughput, low-latency distributed systems and microservices.
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflows.
Direct experience in a fintech environment (RIDE Capital) and with high-consequence commercial data systems.
concerns: Complete lack of any listed management or engineering leadership experience.
No evidence of scaling an engineering team, a hard requirement for the role (from 10 to 30+).
Career progression is exclusively along a senior individual contributor track, which is a poor fit for an executive role.
